basis.official_docs: AscendNPU-IR HIVM Dialect official documentation subset for load/store/set_flag/wait_flag/pipe_barrier and related ops
basis.important_rule: Python emits rewrite intent only. True HIVM IR mutation must be done by HivmOpsEditor/MLIR backend and verified.

unknown_op_policy: unknown HIVM ops block true mutation touching their region; dry-run/report is still allowed
